description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker featuring a combination of light gray suede and navy blue textile panels, accented with tan leather details at the heel and eyelets. The shoe has a perforated toe box for breathability and a padded collar for comfort. The laces are a contrasting tan color, threaded through metal-reinforced eyelets. The midsole is white with subtle speckling, and the outsole is made of dark rubber with a textured tread for grip. The interior appears cushioned, and the insole is branded with the word 'ROX' in white on a dark background. Overall, the shoe is clean, well-constructed, and designed for casual or urban wear.
description: A stylish gray and navy sneaker with tan accents, perforated toe, and a speckled white midsole. Features a cushioned interior and textured rubber outsole.
description_view_0: The underside of the shoe is visible, showing a dark, textured rubber sole with a slightly raised heel and a white midsole edge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gray suede upper, navy blue panel, tan leather heel accent, and tan laces with metal eyelets.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the perforated toe box, tan laces, padded collar, and visible 'ROX' branding on the insole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the navy blue panel, gray suede, and tan heel accent, with the speckled white midsole and blue outsole edge.
attribute_logo: White 'ROX' text on the insole, located at the heel area.
